mnemonics: Shortest Job First (SJF) is Swift Justice
Multilevel Feedback Queue: Maneuver to Level Best
keyPoints: CPU Scheduling is the process of allocating the CPU to a process for execution.
Scheduling criteria include Process Priority, Time Quota, and Resource Availability.
Scheduling algorithms are Round Robin, Shortest Job First, and Priority Scheduling.
Thread Scheduling is a process of allocating the CPU to a thread for execution.
Process Synchronization is a critical component of operating system, ensuring that multiple processes access the CPU simultaneously.
